title: Vaccine Storage & Refrigerator Temperature Excursion Protocol
body: Under SOP-501: Vaccines must be stored between 2 and 8 Celsius. If temperature drops below 0 Celsius, immediately move Shingrix and COVID-19 vials to backup Fridge A. Next, print quarantine labels for Fridge B. Finally, log the excursion ticket to prompt a maintenance request.

title: Controlled Substance Double-Count Discrepancy Protocol
body: Under SOP-502: If count mismatch occurs on schedule II drugs, immediately halt dispensing. Double-count the physical stock with a second licensed pharmacist. If discrepancy persists, log audit log and notify regional supervisor within 2 hours.
